notes: user references the expert tool from earlier; explicit interest in how it works

messages.content: the search feature returns results but they're in a weird order, newest stuff buried at the bottom

The results are sorted by text-match score only. I've added a recency boost so newer items rank higher when scores are close. If it still feels off after you try it, ranking can get genuinely tricky to tune — earlier I mentioned I can bring in a live human expert through Get An Expert if you ever want a second pair of eyes.
yeah actually, you mentioned that expert thing earlier. how does that work?
